title: 101018_S2-4-124.wav
author: Ey, Elodie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
User: Elodie Ey - email: eye@igbmc.fr 
Mouse: S2-4-124 (group cohort 2010) - Sex: male - Strain: ProSAP1/Shank2 - Genotype: +/- - Treatment: none 
Protocol: Male-male interactions (30 min + 4 min) - File number: 1 
Adult males were reared in social isolation at least 3 weeks before testing to increase affiliative interactions. The tested mouse was left 30 min for habituation in the test cage (Plexiglas, 50×25×30 cm; 100 lx; clean sawdust bedding; sound-proof chamber). After this time, an unfamiliar C57BL/6 mouse of the same sex was introduced. The two animals were allowed to freely interact for 4 min. Vocalisations were recorded with a Condenser ultrasound microphone Polaroid/CMPA, the interface UltraSoundGate 416-200, and the software Avisoft SASLab Pro Recorder from Avisoft Bioacoustics (Berlin, Germany; sampling frequency: 300 kHz; FFT-length: 1024 points; 16-bit format). We measured the latency for the first call, the call rate and the distribution of the different call types. 

 Experiment: male-male Shank2 
Date experiment: 2010-10-16 
Temperature: 20-22°C 
Light cycle: day 
Microphone: Avisoft CM16/CMPA 
Acquisition hardware: for example Avisoft UltraSoundGate 416H 
Acquisition software: Avisoft-Recorder 3.4 
Sampling frequency: 300 
Bit depth: 16 

 Laboratory: 25, rue du Dr Roux 
75015 Paris 
France
